comments.body: @Jacksonmills Thanks for the effort here, I appreciate it. I agree with your post-mortem that it's not necessary, since CSS now supports this natively. So you can just wrap a div and provide your own CSS API for this. But hopefully you find another way to contribute in the future!

labels.description: The problem seems valid, but we don't intend to fix it (won't fix).
